case.title: ARKANSAS PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h: ARKANSAS PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION v. UNITED STATES, 355 U.S. 4 (1957)
ARKANSAS PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF ARKANSAS. No. 197. Decided October 14, 1957.
opinion.p: Harry E. McDermott, Jr. for appellant.
Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Hansen, Robert W. Ginnane and Samuel R. Howell for the United States and the Interstate Commerce Commission, appellees.
Toll R. Ware, Clyde W. Fiddes and Pat Mehaffy for the Missouri Pacific Railroad Co. et al., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
MR. JUSTICE WHITTAKER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
